name: Cosine similarity of two vectors
task: Create /tmp/eval_cos/cos.py with cosine_similarity(a, b) returning dot(a,b) / (|a| * |b|). Raise ValueError on length mismatch or zero-norm vectors.

validation.script: import importlib.util; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_cos/cos.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); C = mod.cosine_similarity; assert abs(C([1,0],[1,0]) - 1) < 1e-9; assert abs(C([1,0],[0,1])) < 1e-9; assert abs(C([1,1],[-1,-1]) + 1) < 1e-9; print('OK')
